PRIN.agent_summary: 17 enterprise architecture principles, telco/AI-native open-core. 3 NON-NEGOTIABLE.

REQ.agent_summary: 49 requirements. AI IN SCOPE. 2 conflicts resolved.

STKE.agent_summary: 16 stakeholders. MCMC/JPDP/NACSA triad. 12 drivers, 5 SMART goals.

MY_MYDIGITAL.agent_summary: MyDIGITAL alignment as commercial-enabler. arckit:my-* are slash commands; command-fallback used.

ADR-002.topic: Operator identity — Keycloak / CAMARA / auth-jwt integration and assurance level
ADR-002.agent_summary: Keycloak central IdP + constrained agent role + vaulted CAMARA egress; two-tier JWT assurance. File seq ADR-001.

MY_CLASSIFICATION.agent_summary: 4-tier commercial classification (PUBLIC/INTERNAL/CONFIDENTIAL/RESTRICTED), 10 datasets. Arahan Keselamatan explicitly NOT binding (comparator only); PDPA 2010 binds personal data. Command-fallback.

STRATEGY.agent_summary: 4 pillars: Standards Leadership (TMF921 CTK), Trusted Autonomous AI, Open-Core Integrity + reference engagement, Data Protection/Security/Regulatory. Mapped to outcomes O-1..O-4.

MY_PDPA.agent_summary: PDPA 2010 + Amendment 2024 fully apply (s.3 govt exemption inapplicable — commercial). 7 Data Protection Principles, DPO appointment, 72h breach notification, data portability, risk-based cross-border (Guideline 03/2025), RM1m penalties. Cross-border: Anthropic Claude INT-002, LangSmith INT-004. Command-fallback.

MY_CLOUD_FIRST.agent_summary: Residency keyed to commercial 4-tier ladder (NOT MyGovCloud/Cloud First — non-binding comparator). RESTRICTED subscriber PII Malaysia-resident under PDPA; secrets vault-only. Landing zones: AWS/Azure/GCP MY regions + operator private cloud; cloud-agnostic K8s+Istio. LangSmith egress flagged. Command-fallback.

ADR-001.topic: Cloud platform and data-centre placement (operator private cloud / public CSP Malaysia region / hybrid)
ADR-001.agent_summary: Decision: Option 3 hybrid classification-driven landing zones (operator private cloud + Malaysian-region public CSP per dataset tier DS-001..010). MyGovCloud/PDSA non-binding comparator. Aligned to MCRES tiers. File seq ADR-002.

ADR-003.topic: Data residency per commercial data-sensitivity classification
ADR-003.agent_summary: Decision: Option 2 tier-differentiated residency keyed to MYCLAS ladder (DS-001..010 table). RESTRICTED PII Malaysia-resident + PDPA-gated cross-border; secrets vault-only. Consistent with ADR-002 (per-dataset rule layer within its hybrid topology). File seq ADR-003.

RISK.agent_summary: 16 risks, 6 Orange Book categories. Top residual: R-001 unsafe autonomous live-network change (12), R-005 NCII cyber-resilience gap (12), R-002/004/006 seam leak/PDPA breach/CTK regression (9). 6 residual exceed appetite (go-live-gating). All domains covered.

HLD.agent_summary: APPROVED WITH CONDITIONS. All 3 NON-NEGOTIABLE principles met; P2/P13 resilience Partial. All 13 FRs covered. 3 blocking gaps: no discrete HLD diagrams (C4/topology/sequence), Keycloak+Redis SPOFs lack HA/DR vs NFR-A-002, ADR-001 elevated-JWT gate unparameterised.

SOBC.agent_summary: Green Book 5-case (Strategic/Economic/Commercial/Financial/Management) framed as commercial venture (operator licensing + SI). Preferred Option 2 Balanced of 4. RM, indicative ROM ranges (A1-A4 assumptions flagged); NPV/BCR deferred to OBC.

SBD.agent_summary: NCSC CAF (14 principles) as discipline; UK-gov controls marked N/A with Malaysian equivalents (NACSA NCII, PDPA/JPDP, MCMC). Top go-live blockers: R-005 NCII (no pentest/attestation), R-004 PDPA (DPIA unapproved), R-002 seam secret-scanning (CI billing). Strengths: zero-trust agent identity, fail-closed PII masking, Istio mTLS.

DPIA.agent_summary: PDPA 2010 + 2024-framed (81 PDPA / 26 JPDP refs; UK GDPR/ICO structure-only, not binding). Subscriber PII via Claude intent translation + PII masking; cross-border transfers (Anthropic Claude, LangSmith) = key risks (R-004, R-010). 0 placeholders, ends END OF DPIA. NOTE: agent hit API socket error on report-back AFTER writing+validating file; orchestrator verified completeness independently.

MY_AI_GOVERNANCE.agent_summary: AIGE (MOSTI 2024) 7 principles each with how-met/gap/action. HITL gate on high-impact network-mutating actions (ADR-001 elevated assurance); binding gap: HITL not yet 100% (R-001 residual 12 > appetite 9, headline go-live condition). Constrained agent identity for accountability; gen_ai.*/rfc9315.phase telemetry for transparency. HIGH-impact/Medium-residual. Command-fallback. ATRS recommended.

MY_CYBER.agent_summary: NACSA NCII SoA under Cyber Security Act 2024 [Act 854]. Stance: operator (U Mobile/TM) is the NCII entity in Communications sector; ibn-core is a vendor/system within operator NCII obligations. Duties: annual risk assessment, NACSA audit, 6h/14d incident notification, code-of-practice (RM500k/10yr). 24 controls (13 done / 7 partial / 4 not). Cross-refs SECD CAF + R-005. Command-fallback.

AIP.agent_summary: UK AI Playbook 10 principles + 6 ethical themes as responsible-AI lens; score 118/160 (74%) AMBER, MEDIUM-RISK, APPROVED WITH CONDITIONS. AI auto-detected in scope (FR-002/003/007/011). Weakest: Human Control (6, HITL not 100%), Fairness, Contestability. AIGE/MOSTI+PDPA+NACSA binding; UK bodies reference-only.

OPS.agent_summary: Operational readiness pack: SLOs/SLIs from NFRs (99.0->99.95% avail, NL->Intent <10s p95), 3-tier support, 10 runbooks incl 6.8 agent kill-switch+HITL (R-001), 6.9 Redis SSoT failover, 6.10 Keycloak IdP outage. NACSA NCII 6h/14d + PDPA 72h dual-clock incident timelines. HA/DR vs NFR-A-002 (RPO<=15min/RTO<=4h). Built on retry after prior agent network error.

TRACE.agent_summary: Traceability matrix REQ->ADR->HLD->RISK->compliance->OPS. Design coverage 44/46 (95.7%); MUST+CRITICAL 29/29 (100%); 0 orphan ADRs; 0 unmitigated risks (16/16 traced). Score 90/100 APPROVED WITH CONDITIONS. Gaps: NFR-U-001/NFR-M-002 untraced orphans, NFR-SEC-002 authz verification thin, FR-004/010/012 verification implicit.
